# Interactive CLI prompt fixtures
# Format: LINE | EXPECTED_TYPE | EXPECTED_MIN_CONFIDENCE

Do you want to continue? [Y/n] |yes_no|0.9
Proceed with installation? [y/N] |yes_no|0.9
Password: |password|0.9
Enter passphrase: |password|0.9
Enter a value: |enter_value|0.8
? Project name: |npm_init|0.8
Are you sure you want to continue connecting (yes/no)? |ssh_confirm|0.9
Username: |docker_login|0.8
>>> |python_repl|0.8
mysql> |sql_prompt|0.8
